validationChecks.criterion: AC1 вЂ” GET /history returns authenticated user's recent matches with matchId, myRank, participantCount, winner
validationChecks.evidence: server/src/history/routes.js GET / with requireAuth, clamp limit 1-50, offset>=0; queries.js getMatchList joins matchesв†’match_participantsв†’characters filtering mc.user_id=$1 and status='finished', returns matchId/myRank/participantCount/winner fields

validationChecks.criterion: AC2 вЂ” GET /history/:matchId returns full participants ranked + oracle messages time-ordered
validationChecks.evidence: queries.js getMatchDetail returns participants ORDER BY placement ASC and oracles ORDER BY invoked_at ASC (latest 100 via DESC LIMIT 100 subquery then re-sorted ASC)

validationChecks.criterion: AC3 вЂ” MatchHistoryScreen shows card list, 'лЌ” ліґкё°' loads next 20
validationChecks.evidence: MatchHistoryScreen.gd: _load_page() uses PAGE_SIZE=20 + _offset; _more_btn shown when _offset < _total; _on_more_pressed increments offset

validationChecks.criterion: AC4 вЂ” Card click в†’ MatchDetailScreen with participants + oracle feed
validationChecks.evidence: MatchHistoryScreen _make_card emits detail_requested(match_id); Main.gd _on_match_detail_requested calls load_match then _show_screen('match_detail'); MatchDetailScreen._render() builds both panels

validationChecks.criterion: AC5 вЂ” 1л“± м№ґл“њ accent-gold к°•мЎ°, л‚ґ м°ёк°Ђмћђ н–‰ accent-purple к°•мЎ°
validationChecks.evidence: MatchHistoryScreen._make_card: is_winner sets border_width_left=4 + border_color=ACCENT_GOLD; MatchDetailScreen._make_participant_row: is_me sets bg Color(ACCENT_PURPLE,0.2), rank==1 sets bg Color(ACCENT_GOLD,0.15)

validationChecks.criterion: AC6 вЂ” CharacterListScreen 'кІЅкё° кё°лЎќ' лІ„нЉј в†’ MatchHistoryScreen
validationChecks.evidence: CharacterListScreen.gd: signal history_requested added; history_btn created in _build_ui emitting history_requested; Main.gd connects history_requested to _on_history_requested which calls fetch_history and _show_screen('match_history')

validationChecks.criterion: AC7 вЂ” кІЅкё° кё°лЎќ м—†мќ„ л•Њ 'м•„м§Ѓ кІЅкё° кё°лЎќмќґ м—†мЉµл‹€л‹¤' л№€ мѓЃнѓњ л©”м‹њм§Ђ
validationChecks.evidence: MatchHistoryScreen._on_request_completed: when offset==0 and matches.is_empty(), sets _empty_lbl.visible=true with text 'м•„м§Ѓ кІЅкё° кё°лЎќмќґ м—†мЉµл‹€л‹¤.'

validationChecks.criterion: AC8 вЂ” isMe=true м‹ нѓЃ л©”м‹њм§Ђ accent-purple л°°кІЅ
validationChecks.evidence: MatchDetailScreen._make_oracle_card: is_me sets style.bg_color=Color(ACCENT_PURPLE,0.18)

validationChecks.criterion: AC9 вЂ” GET /history/:matchId мќ‘л‹µм—ђ oracleCount н•„л“њ
validationChecks.evidence: queries.js getMatchDetail: SELECT COUNT(*) from oracle_invocations for the match, returned as oracleCount in response object
